title: Gomphocentrum vesiculatum
taxonomy: Gomphocentrum vesiculatum is a species of orchid, and it belongs to the genus Gomphocentrum. Within the orchid family (Orchidaceae), Gomphocentrum vesiculatum is classified. The species is further classified into the subfamily Catasetoideae and is native to Central America. It is a terrestrial orchid, which means it grows in the ground rather than on other plants or trees. Further classification details may vary depending on the source and the latest taxonomy.
